candidate.description: LLM inference acceleration where a small draft model proposes K tokens and a large target model verifies them in parallel, accepting the longest valid prefix.

candidates_full.full_description: ML applied to understanding and generating human language; covers classification, NER, summarization, translation, and generation. Speculative decoding is a recent inference-time optimization technique not previously catalogued.
Grounding LLM responses with retrieved documents for accuracy and currency.
